name: midbrain

metadata.name: MidBrain
metadata.summary: Your magical CLI for generating text spells and performing tasks.

documentation:
# Aura-CLI

Aura-CLI is a AI command-line interface tool that allows you to interact with powerful AI models for text generation. You can also run standard shell commands within the same interface!

## Features:
- **Text Generation**: Use powerful AI models to generate text based on your prompts (using models like GPT-2, GPT-J 6B, Mistral 7B).
- **Normal Shell Commands**: Run any normal shell command (e.g., `ls`, `cd`, `pwd`, etc.) within the same interface.
- **Interactive AI CLI**: Type commands interactively, with the option to prepend `aura` to invoke the AI text-generation feature.
- **Model Selection**: Select the AI model you'd like to use for generating text (GPT-2, GPT-J 6B, Mistral 7B).

## Info
GPT-2 might not give relevant information, we suggest you to try out other larger models. More models will be available in the upcoming releases.

## Installation:
pip install MidBrain

## Usage:
Append aura at the starting of your query.

midbrain your_text?

```bash
pip install MidBrain

functions.name: MidBrain.MidBrain.load_model
documentation: Load the AI model if not already loaded.

functions.name: MidBrain.MidBrain.perform_midbrain
documentation: Generate text using the AI model.

functions.name: MidBrain.MidBrain.execute_system_command
documentation: Execute a system shell command and return the output.

functions.name: MidBrain.MidBrain.select_model
documentation: Prompt the user to select a model from available options.
